basic_details.job_title: NVS Jaipur Counsellors Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti Jaipur (NVS Jaipur) Counsellors Notification 2026 has been released on 14-05-2026 on the official website of NVS Jaipur. Have been announced through the NVS Jaipur Counsellors Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 28 years Maximum Age: 49 years Age relaxation will be as per the rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s Degree (M.A./M.Sc.) in Psychology from a recognized university or institution. One year Diploma
qualification.details: Master’s Degree (M.A./M.Sc.) in Psychology from a recognized university or institution. One year Diploma in Guidance & Counselling from a recognized university or institution. At least one year experience in Guidance & Counselling/Counselling in educational institutes of Central/State/UT Government/Autonomous Bodies of Central/State Government/Public Sector Undertaking. For non-JNV experience, certificate of satisfactory performance and good conduct from previous employer mandatory.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on essential and desirable qualifications and experience (70 marks) Personal Talk/Interview (30 marks)
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NVS Jaipur Counsellors Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 28-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NVS Jaipur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NVS Jaipur Counsellors recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the NVS Jaipur Counsellors (Male/Female) posts is 28-05-2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Counsellor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master’s Degree (M.A./M.Sc.) in Psychology and a one-year Diploma in Guidance & Counselling from a recognized institution, along with at least one year of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Counsellor position?
faq.answer: The age limit for Counsellors (Male/Female) is between 28 years and 49 years as of 01-05-2026. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Counsellor post?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Counsellor post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 44,900/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Counsellor role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting based on qualifications and experience (70 marks) followed by a Personal Talk/Interview (30 marks).

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, the application fee is Rs. 500/- for General/OBC candidates. SC/ST candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for NVS Jaipur Counsellors recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for this recruitment must be submitted through the online mode only. Offline applications will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for the Counsellor position?
faq.answer: The Counsellor position is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies announced?
faq.answer: The official notification indicates 0 vacancies for the Counsellors (Male/Female) post in this recruitment drive.
